purpose: Round 398 PromotionRound promoted exactly one release user-guide page: full_site/release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/ShapingAPI.html. The page was compared against https://openusd.org/release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/ShapingAPI.html and the local source snapshot source/full_release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/ShapingAPI_source.html, then upgraded from bilingual_draft to bilingual_complete with Chinese main-reading-path coverage for light emission shaping, Light Shaping context, all seven official inputs:shaping:* properties, cone/focus/IES formula semantics, ANSI/IES LM-63-19 reference, renderer support and USD composition debugging, adjacent LightAPI/ShadowAPI/concrete light schema boundaries, and local reading-flow preservation. This round increased good_bilingual from 98 to 99 and review_ready_zh from 35 to 36.

problems.summary: The promotion path now raises completion to 99/406, but the remaining 307 draft pages still need real upgrades.
problems.evidence: reports/bilingual_completion_promotions.json records 91 promoted pages; discover_openusd_all_pages.mjs reports bilingual_complete=99, and audit_openusd_translation_quality.mjs reports good_bilingual=99.
problems.required_action: Continue using the promotion manifest only for pages with Chinese main-reading-path coverage, paragraph-level structure, and draft-marker removal; do not mark guide-only drafts as complete.

problems.summary: The final entry must keep completed and draft counts aligned with inventory, quality, English debt, and problem audit.
problems.evidence: openusd_bilingual_final.html is rebuilt from inventory and shows 99 complete pages and 307 incomplete drafts; validation_report passed=true with failed_check_count=0.
problems.required_action: Keep final-entry counts and completed-page tables dynamic; keep bilingual_draft clearly described as incomplete translation.

problems.summary: The old heartbeat automation optimized for repeated 5-page refinement and GitHub sync rather than real completion progress.
problems.evidence: The openusd heartbeat uses PromotionRound/DefectRound/ConsistencyRound and requires good_bilingual growth, review_ready_zh improvement in an EnglishDebtRound, or named P0/P1 fixes before push.
problems.required_action: Keep the automation prompt aligned with current counts and the promotion mechanism; do not let it regress to count-neutral round churn.

problems.summary: Fixed in round 396 and preserved in round 398: completed full_site pages expose a real local reading path with side navigation, breadcrumb, local release/API entrances, related pages, previous/next links, and explicit official-source jumps.
problems.evidence: reports/reading_flow_navigation_audit.json reports completed_full_site_pages=91, pages_with_side_nav=91, pages_with_breadcrumb=91, release_pages_with_release_entry=22/22, api_pages_with_api_entry=69/69, sample_paths_passed=8/8, official_leak_count=0.
problems.required_action: Keep inject_openusd_reading_flow_navigation.mjs and audit_openusd_reading_flow_navigation.mjs in the validation chain whenever promoted pages or navigation status changes.

problems.summary: Human-facing progress Markdown had previously been damaged by Windows encoding handoffs; the encoding guard remains required.
problems.evidence: reports/markdown_encoding_audit.json is kept in the validation chain and must show no repeated question-mark damage, replacement characters, mojibake markers, or UTF-8 BOM.
problems.required_action: If audit_openusd_markdown_encoding.mjs fails, stop promotion and regenerate the Markdown from JSON truth sources before continuing.

problems.summary: Many clicks still route to the local uncovered placeholder because the 406-page inventory does not contain every official Doxygen target.
problems.evidence: local_link_routing_report records uncovered links, while reading_flow_navigation_audit confirms completed-page primary reading paths stay local and only explicit official-source links leave the site.
problems.required_action: Prioritize high-click navigation and TOC links for local anchors or inventory expansion; do not present placeholder routing as a finished reading experience.

problems.summary: Most remaining draft pages contain Chinese guidance and term notes, not paragraph-level bilingual translation. 296 pages remain draft_needs_translation and 11 remain draft_template_only.
problems.required_action: For selected high-value pages, replace or supplement guide-only blocks with dense Chinese main-reading-path coverage and then promote status only if the page passes quality and English debt audits.

problems.summary: The good_bilingual count is useful but still too broad to prove human-review-ready Chinese reading quality; English/Chinese ratio remains diagnostic only, not a hard failure.
problems.evidence: reports/english_debt_audit.json reports review_ready_zh=36, review_needs_zh_debt=63, release_review_ready_zh=24. ShapingAPI is review_ready_zh=true after round 398.
problems.required_action: Report review_ready_zh alongside good_bilingual; schedule EnglishDebtRound for pages missing section coverage or Chinese main reading path, not merely because English remains abundant.

problems.summary: Completion remains API-skewed while release/tutorial/user-guide pages still lag, although recent S2 rounds moved usdLux and tutorial pages forward.
problems.evidence: reports/english_debt_audit.json reports api_complete=72 and release_complete=27; release_review_ready_zh=24.
problems.required_action: Continue release/tutorial/user-guide PromotionRounds unless a named P0/P1 defect blocks the run.

next_actions: Next best PromotionRound target: full_site/release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/SphereLight.html, if it can become good_bilingual and preferably review_ready_zh.
Keep Markdown encoding, English debt, local link routing, navigation coverage, reading-flow navigation, full draft preview, report index, and validation in the fixed audit chain.
Do not batch-promote multiple pages in one round.
next_action: PromotionRound target full_site/release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/SphereLight.html, if it can become good_bilingual; otherwise stop and report the concrete blocker.
